nasb.text: Evil men do not understand justice, But those who seek the Lord understand all things.

esv.text: Evil men do not understand justice, but those who seek the Lord  understand it completely.

cnv.text: 壞人不知公正是甚麼， 尋求耶和華的卻完全明白。

ccb.text: 邪恶之人不明白公义， 寻求耶和华的全然明白。

csbs.text: 恶人不领悟什么是公正； 但寻求耶和华的，却领悟一切。
